forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 5am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. Low around 53, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. South southeast wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 4pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 67, with temperatures falling to around 54 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 13 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 36. West northwest wind 8 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
